Case# TKSmartCardPINFormat.Charset.upperAlphanumeric

iOS 9.0+iPadOS 9.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.11+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
case upperAlphanumeric
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardPINFormat/Charset-swift.enum/upperAlphanumeric#Discussion)

PIN can be composed of digits and uppercase letters.
